name: vidseeds
description: VidSeeds.ai connector — drive pre-upload video SEO & metadata optimization and multi-platform publishing from your AI client. 178 tools: vidseeds_suggest_titles (light 1-seed titles) + focus support on regen/optimize, titles/descriptions/tags, AI thumbnails, chapters, auto-clips, channel analytics & intelligence, keyword research, translation/captions (85 languages), and direct YouTube publishing. Includes workflow skills for efficient MCP use. Paid connector with a 14-day free trial. Auth via a free Personal Access Token (or OAuth 2.0 for Claude.ai / Desktop).
